roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENDENCE - FILED AT INSISTENCE
DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE (PENAL CODE 1538,5) FILED

/CAL:FINAL TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DEF 170,6JUD:MICHAEL MCNAUGHTON/MODENIED/X:MOTION UNTIMELY/NP/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL AND COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLEHAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION AS TO RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM IN THIS CASE, PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $500,00PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM JANETTETORRES REYES/X: THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT (THROUGH COUNSEL) TO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE STIPULATED AMOUNT,/X: CR-110AND CR-111 FILED IN OPEN COURT/CCU/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:THE PD STATES THEY DON'T HAVE AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT/CONTD:FINAL TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU: ATTORNEY HASAUTHORITY/

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH8 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 83D/CTS  83/PF390 18/VF2 150/FOP1:  6  MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/4019HALF/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:03-16-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/CAL DISPOSITION/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADCOUNT 8 23132(A)VC), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 8/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/PD/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/WEAP/NALC/RX/NTW/LDPX:06-11-20 (30TH GCF COVID-19) & 06-29-20 (60TH GCF COVID-19)/CONTD:TO SET, CUSTODY STATUS & ACM PLACEMENT ON 05-08-20/OR/
/CAL: TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/CONT/DOPU: ATTY AUTH/
/CAL:DA RETURN PURSUANT 1381PC/BWR: 06-09-20/BWR1/X:LD 12-31-20 FOR THE 1381PC DEMAND/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:90 MINUTES/
/CAL:TO SET, CUSTODY STATUS & ACM PLACEMENT/DAWT/CONTD:PD DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
